title: Clinical management following self-harm in a UK-wide primary care cohort.
author: Carr MJ Ashcroft DM Kontopantelis E While D Awenat Y Cooper J Chew-Graham C Kapur N Webb RT
content:
S-EPMC4870375 PMC4870375 Clinical management following self-harm in a UK-wide primary care cohort.

Background

Little is known about the clinical management of patients in primary care following self-harm.

Methods

A descriptive cohort study using data from 684 UK general practices
